name: ETH Squeeze Persistence v1
thesis: ETH 4h is the cleaner similar-asset lane for testing volatility squeeze expansion confirmed by persistence instead of the first breakout bar. The edge should come from broad post-squeeze alignment, not from chasing the initial impulse.
invalidation_condition: Abort if squeeze setups are too sparse, if persistence confirmation still arrives too late, or if post-squeeze moves fade too quickly after costs.

pre_submit_reasoning.market_behavior_targeted: Compression resolves into directional expansion, and entry is taken only when price holds aligned with fast value rather than instantly reversing.
pre_submit_reasoning.why_edge_should_exist: Choppy markets often fake the first breakout bar. Requiring post-squeeze persistence should filter weaker breaks while staying broader than rare multi-stage breakout stacks.
pre_submit_reasoning.asset_timeframe_fit: ETH 4h is suitable because squeeze and hold structure is cleaner than on higher-beta lanes, making role separation easier to test honestly.
pre_submit_reasoning.likely_failure_mode: If compression resolves into immediate mean reversion rather than follow-through, persistence confirmation may still not save the move.
pre_submit_reasoning.first_refinement_path: If entries trade but continuation stalls, reduce runner exposure before altering the squeeze definition.

density_sanity_check.contradictory_filters: none obvious; squeeze and post-break hold are sequential
density_sanity_check.event_sparsity: managed with moderate compression thresholds instead of extreme squeeze-only definitions
